title: Williams-Sonoma Is An Anti-Bubble Blue-Chip With Yummy Upside
text: Williams-Sonoma has explosive pandemic growth and yet is expected to continue posting positive growth, despite all the challenges the company is currently facing. By 2028, if WSM grows as expected (10.5% CAGR) and returns to historical fair value, it could deliver 200% total returns or 21% annually.
